name: ai-output-runtime
description: Agent-agnostic skill for AI Output Runtime v0.1: a small Markdown + JSON contract for LLM-generated reports.

scripts.test:valid: node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/valid-v0.1.md && node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/report-demo.md && node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/chart-demo.md && node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/landing.md && node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/weekly-report-demo.md && node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/dashboard-demo.md
scripts.test:invalid: node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/invalid-html.md && exit 1 || exit 0
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:valid && npm run test:invalid
scripts.render:site: node scripts/aio.mjs render examples/landing.md --inline-runtime --lang en --out docs/index.html --og-title 'AI Output Runtime' --og-description 'A Markdown contract for AI reports — 15 components (charts, funnels, KPI gauges, P&L bridges, risk matrices, action items), 30 syntax-highlight languages, no HTML.' --og-image 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wxkingstar/ai-output-runtime/v0.4.3/docs/screenshots/landing-light.png' --og-url 'https://wxkingstar.github.io/ai-output-runtime/' && node scripts/aio.mjs render examples/report-demo.md --inline-runtime --lang zh-CN --out docs/demo-zh.html --og-title 'AIO 报告示例（中文）' --og-description 'AI Output Runtime — 15 个组件的中文报告 demo。' --og-image 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wxkingstar/ai-output-runtime/v0.4.3/docs/screenshots/landing-light.png' --og-url 'https://wxkingstar.github.io/ai-output-runtime/demo-zh.html' && node scripts/aio.mjs render examples/chart-demo.md --inline-runtime --lang en --out docs/demo-charts.html --og-title 'AIO Charts demo' --og-description 'AI Output Runtime — chart components demo (line, bar, area, pie, donut).' --og-image 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wxkingstar/ai-output-runtime/v0.4.3/docs/screenshots/charts-light.png' --og-url 'https://wxkingstar.github.io/ai-output-runtime/demo-charts.html' && node scripts/aio.mjs render examples/weekly-report-demo.md --inline-runtime --lang zh-CN --out docs/demo-weekly.html --og-title 'AIO 周报示例' --og-description 'AI Output Runtime — 周报 demo，含 report-header / trend-card / status-grid / timeline / action-items / comparison。' --og-image 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wxkingstar/ai-output-runtime/v0.4.3/docs/screenshots/weekly-dark.png' --og-url 'https://wxkingstar.github.io/ai-output-runtime/demo-weekly.html' && node scripts/aio.mjs render examples/dashboard-demo.md --inline-runtime --lang zh-CN --out docs/demo-dashboard.html --og-title 'AIO Q1 经营复盘示例' --og-description 'AI Output Runtime — Q1 经营复盘 dashboard，含 gauge / funnel / waterfall / heatmap / matrix。' --og-image 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wxkingstar/ai-output-runtime/v0.4.3/docs/screenshots/dashboard-dark.png' --og-url 'https://wxkingstar.github.io/ai-output-runtime/demo-dashboard.html'

author: wxkingstar
